header.title: Interview calendar
header.desc: Keep track of scheduled interviews, what's coming up, and the candidates still waiting for a slot.

proximas.title: Upcoming interviews
proximas.vaziaBusca: No interviews found for this search.

detalhe.cancelarDescricao: The interview with {{cand}} will be canceled and the candidate returns to the scheduling queue.

agendar.dispCandidatoDica: Choose one of the dates the candidate indicated.
agendar.escolhaData: Pick a date to see the available times.
agendar.semHorarioTitulo: No free time on this day
agendar.semHorarioUm: The interviewer has no available times on this date.
agendar.semHorarioVarios: The {{n}} interviewers don't have a common time on this date.
agendar.proximaDataLivre: Go to the next free date · {{data}}
agendar.tenteOutraDataReduza: Try another date or remove some interviewers.
agendar.horariosUm: Open times on the interviewer's calendar.
agendar.horariosVarios: Times when all {{n}} interviewers are free at once.
agendar.linkPlaceholder: Generated automatically by Teams on confirmation
agendar.teamsNota: A Microsoft Teams meeting is created and sent with the invite.
agendar.observacoesPlaceholder: Notes for the interviewers, conversation agenda… (optional)
agendar.reagendarDescricao: The interview with {{cand}} will be moved to the newly selected date and time.

sheet.descAgendar: Form to set the date, time, format, and interviewer.

toast.agendada_one: Interview with {{cand}} scheduled for {{data}} at {{hora}} · {{count}} interviewer{{via}}.
toast.agendada_other: Interview with {{cand}} scheduled for {{data}} at {{hora}} · {{count}} interviewers{{via}}.
toast.viaTeams: · Teams meeting created and invite sent
toast.cancelada: Interview with {{cand}} canceled, returned to the queue.
